title: Plushia Pack [Cobblemon]
description: Official Modpack for the Plushia Cobblemon Server.
body:
### This modpack is the official modpack for the Plushia Cobblemon Server

#### At Plushia, we strive to create an inclusive and welcoming safe space for LGBTQIA+ people, and give them a place where they can play games without the fear of discrimination.

---

This modpack is for our Cobblemon Server, it is a cobblemon-focussed modpack with plenty of decoration, optimization, and all types of other different mods.

**We even have custom menus and loading screens made with FancyMenu!**

<details>
<summary>Full List of Mods</summary>

- **Ambient Sounds** by creativemd
- **Appleskin** by squeek502
- **Architectury API** by shedaniel
- **Athena** by CodexAdrian
- **Automobility** by FoundationGames
- **Blåhaj** by hibi
- **Capes** by caelthecolher
- **Chat Heads** by dzwdz
- **Chipped** by Terrarium
- **Cluttered** by beelake
- **Cobblemon** by Cobblemon
- **Continuity** by peppercode1
- **Controlling** by jaredlll08
- **CraterLib** by hypherionsa
- **Create Fabric** by tropheusj
- **Create Slice & Dice** by possible_triangle

- **CreativeCore** by creativemd

- **Presence Footsteps** by Sollace
- **Quilt Kotlin Libraries (QKL)** by Quilt-Holdings
- **Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL)** by Quilt-Holdings

- **Searchables** by jaredlll08
- **Simple Discord RPC** by hypherionsa

- **Xaero's Minimap** by thexaero
- **Xaero's World Map** by thexaero

</details>


---

#### Some things you can do with this modpack and on our server:
- Capture and train your very own Pokémon, including our custom Pokémon we have created, with **Cobblemon**
- Create your dream farm and make special foods with **Farmer's Delight**
- Automate everything and get around the map in trains with **Create**
- Gain access to hundreds of new block to use in your builds with **Chipped**
- Decorate your interiors with a whole new level of detail with **Handcrafted** and **Cluttered**
- Explore the massive Plushia region with beautiful ambience added by **Ambient Sounds**, **Falling Leaves**, **Iris Shaders**, and **Wakes**
- So much more that you will have to discover for yourself!

---


### Join Plushia today by joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/U9ueyjQ3HS)!
